PARAM.description: x must be a non-null array
PARAM.name: x
PARAM.content: Domain values where the function changes value.

PARAM.description: y must have same length as x
PARAM.name: y

THROWS.description: if the x array is not sorted in strictly increasing order.
THROWS.name: NonMonotonicSequenceException
THROWS.content: if the x array is not sorted in strictly increasing order.

THROWS.description: if x or y are null.
THROWS.name: NullArgumentException

THROWS.description: if x or y are zero-length.
THROWS.name: NoDataException
THROWS.content: if x or y are zero-length.

THROWS.description: if x and y do not have the same length.
THROWS.name: DimensionMismatchException
THROWS.content: if x and y do not have the same length.
